sentiment.summary: Iran war + shocking jobs miss (-92K vs +56K expected) sent stocks, crypto, and risk assets into a brutal Friday selloff. Oil hit $90, VIX spiked to 29.49 — worst week in months.

insights.text: Stagflation fears are back — jobs crash + oil surge. Feb payrolls lost 92K (expected +56K). WTI oil hit $90 as Trump demanded Iran's unconditional surrender. Fed can't cut into this — weak growth AND rising inflation. Tech bled, energy was the only winner.

$805M SDA contract — biggest in company history. Record 2025 revenue of $602M beat estimates. 4th launch of 2026 complete, 2 missions in 6 days. Cantor raised PT to $85. You're up 13% from your $62 avg cost at ~$70. Neutron delay to Q4 2026 is the only real risk.

Bounced 7.3% today on CargoSeer acquisition — but still down 58% from cost. Revenue missed at $27.3M vs $33M expected (-38% YoY). Debt cut 90% is good. The AI defense pivot via CargoSeer and Ask Sage is the turnaround thesis. Needs serious catalyst to recover.

1.2GW Missouri AI factory approved — biggest US campus yet. Revenue up 461-547% YoY, deals with Microsoft ($19.4B) and Meta ($3B). At $95, you're down 27% from your $131 cost but fundamentals are accelerating. Heavy capex ($16-20B) is the only real risk.

Section 45X tax credits confirmed + Encompass Capital all-in. Smart money bought $95M more shares — TE is their #1 holding. 900 MW supply deal signed. G2_Austin fab under construction. At $6.61, just below your $6.73 avg cost. 100% analyst Strong Buy consensus.

Great fundamentals, caught in the tech selloff. EPS beat ($3.11 vs $2.77 est), Mozaic HAMR drives qualified with 2 hyperscalers. But at ~$378, you're down 16% from your $449 cost. Analyst target $447. Iran oil shock inflates server costs — macro headwind is real.

Down 51% from your $125 cost — nuclear speculative names got crushed. Meta 1.2GW nuclear deal and BofA Buy upgrade ($127 PT) keep thesis alive. But COO sold $12.6M in stock, revenue is 2+ years away. Earnings March 17 — watch this closely.

SpaceX proxy play — up 300% since 2025. The $11B SpaceX equity stake is the real story. At $117, near your $114 cost and 11% off Jan's $131 all-time high. Risk: SpaceX IPO delay unwinds the narrative fast. $3.5B debt due 2027 is the overhang.

⚠️ Fraud investigations launched — proceed with extreme caution. Multiple law firms investigating. $1.1B LEO backlog is real, MDA SHIELD contract won. But stock swings 10%+ daily. Earnings March 26 (EPS -$1.05 expected). At $32, near breakeven on your $33 cost.

Pivoting from mobile to AI data center power — high risk, high reward. Revenue tiny ($7.3M Q4, -59% YoY) during transition. New 250kW Solid-State Transformer for AI is innovative. CFO departing mid-pivot. At $8.86, down 11% from $10 cost. Beta 3.16 — swings HARD.

BTC at $68.8K, bleeding with risk assets. Iran war sent oil to $90 and crushed crypto. Fear & Greed index at 24. ETF inflows reversed to outflows. Key support at $67.5K — a break there targets $60K. You're down 6% from your $73,135 cost. Not acting as a hedge.
